title: bidens sambucifolia
intro: Bidens sambucifolia, also known as the blue devil or tickseed coreopsis, is a flowering plant species within the aster family, Asteraceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, stems, and roots, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bidens sambucifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as combat infections. Herbal preparations of Bidens sambucifolia may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
